evals.expected_output: Review should identify: (1) Bug - sequential awaits in loop should use Promise.all, (2) Security - path traversal in renderUserPage where userId is used directly in file path without sanitization, (3) Performance - N+1 pattern in processUserOrders querying db once per user

Review should identify: (1) Critical Security - SQL injection in search_users via f-string interpolation, (2) Critical Security - unsafe pickle deserialization of untrusted cookie data (RCE), (3) Bug - mutable default argument in get_all_users

Review should identify: (1) Bug/Memory leak - WebSocket not closed on cleanup (missing useEffect return cleanup), (2) Security - dangerouslySetInnerHTML with unsanitized data?.bio (XSS), (3) Bug - fetch in useEffect has no cleanup/abort for when component unmounts, (4) Bug - use of 'any' type hiding potential issues
